title: SASC Advances 679 Military Nominations
description: Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to report out favorably a list of 679 military nominations in the Army, Navy, Air...
text:
Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to report out favorably a list of 679 military nominations in the Army, Navy, Air Force, Marine Corps, and Space Force.
The list of military promotions includes 81 general officers and flag officers.
The nominations were immediately reported to the floor following the Committee’s action.
